meaning: n.书写的文字,字体,刻出的字母
examples: The lettering is fuzzy and indistinct.
The lettering stood out well against the dark background.
Oh, in my case there was just lettering.
Its eye-catching logo of white lettering on a blue background made it recognizable from a distance.
All models incorporate backlit keyboards, illuminating the lettering for typing in low light situations.
